## Description

The market square bustles with merchants and shoppers.

<!-- gm-only -->
A pickpocket gang operates here, led by Fingers McGee.
They target anyone carrying visible coin purses.
<!-- /gm-only -->

Fresh produce is sold near the fountain.

## Shops

The blacksmith offers weapons and repairs.

<!-- gm-only -->
The blacksmith is also a fence for stolen goods.
<!-- /gm-only -->

The apothecary sells herbs and tonics.
